description_long: This object consists of two stacked rectangular blocks, both with a dark, almost black surface featuring a subtle grid or line pattern. The lower block is a large, solid cube, while the upper block is a thinner, elongated rectangular slab positioned centrally above the cube, creating a T-shaped profile. The surfaces appear smooth and hard, likely made from a dense material such as concrete or stone, and the patterning suggests a modern, urban design. The object is monolithic and robust, suitable for use as a sidewalk barrier, plinth, or seating element in an urban environment. There are no visible openings, handles, or interactive components, and the object is not hollow. Its overall appearance is utilitarian and minimalist, blending into contemporary cityscapes.
description: A T-shaped, dark, grid-patterned sidewalk block composed of a large cube with a thinner rectangular slab on top. The surface is smooth, hard, and modern, suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full T-shape with the large cube base and the thinner slab centered above it.
description_view_1: Angled view reveals the depth of both the cube and the slab, highlighting the overhang of the upper block.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the T-shape with the slab directly above the cube.
description_view_3: Opposite angled view, similar to view 1, showing the side profile and the overhang of the upper slab.
